mapper.select: SELECT no, user_id, id, start_at, end_at, CASE day_of_week WHEN '월' THEN 'MON' WHEN '화' THEN 'TUE' WHEN '수' THEN 'WED' WHEN '목' THEN 'THU' WHEN '금' THEN 'FRI' WHEN '토' THEN 'SAT' WHEN '일' THEN 'SUN' ELSE day_of_week END AS day_of_week, created_at, updated_at FROM tutor_time_range WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY FIELD( CASE day_of_week WHEN '월' THEN 'MON' WHEN '화' THEN 'TUE' WHEN '수' THEN 'WED' WHEN '목' THEN 'THU' WHEN '금' THEN 'FRI' WHEN '토' THEN 'SAT' WHEN '일' THEN 'SUN' ELSE day_of_week END, 'MON', 'TUE', 'WED', 'THU', 'FRI', 'SAT', 'SUN' ), start_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tutor_time_range (user_id, id, start_at, end_at, day_of_week) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{id}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, CASE #{dayOfWeek} WHEN 'MON' THEN '월' WHEN 'TUE' THEN '화' WHEN 'WED' THEN '수' WHEN 'THU' THEN '목' WHEN 'FRI' THEN '금' WHEN 'SAT' THEN '토' WHEN 'SUN' THEN '일' ELSE #{dayOfWeek} END )

INSERT INTO tutor_time_range (user_id, id, start_at, end_at, day_of_week) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.id}, #{item.startAt}, #{item.endAt}, CASE #{item.dayOfWeek} WHEN 'MON' THEN '월' WHEN 'TUE' THEN '화' WHEN 'WED' THEN '수' WHEN 'THU' THEN '목' WHEN 'FRI' THEN '금' WHEN 'SAT' THEN '토' WHEN 'SUN' THEN '일' ELSE #{item.dayOfWeek} END )
mapper.update: UPDATE tutor_time_range SET start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, day_of_week = CASE #{dayOfWeek} WHEN 'MON' THEN '월' WHEN 'TUE' THEN '화' WHEN 'WED' THEN '수' WHEN 'THU' THEN '목' WHEN 'FRI' THEN '금' WHEN 'SAT' THEN '토' WHEN 'SUN' THEN '일' ELSE #{dayOfWeek} END WHERE id = #{id}
